steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage concludes that the general public regards attitudes/outlooks as an important benefit. The correct answer must show data that demonstrates how the general public itself ranked that service relative to others.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The improvement of physical health was ranked lower for the general public than it was for project leaders.: The service referenced is not attitudes/outlooks, so it does not support the conclusion. ✗
  • Choice B — The provision of raw materials was ranked higher for the general public than was the improvement of attitudes and outlooks.: This reverses the table: for the general public, improvement of attitudes and outlooks is ranked 4 and provision of raw materials is ranked 15, so attitudes/outlooks is ranked higher. ✗
  • Choice C — The improvement of attitudes and outlooks was ranked higher for stakeholders than it was for the general public.: Makes a between-group comparison instead of demonstrating the general public's own prioritization. ✗
  • Choice D — The improvement of attitudes and outlooks was ranked higher for the general public than were the other four services.: Shows that the general public ranked this benefit higher than all others listed, directly supporting that they regard it as important. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
